subject: Re: Greenfield Analytics — Case Studies & Next Steps

messages.body:
Hi Tom,

Great chatting today. As promised, here are the case studies:

1. CloudBridge Systems — 60% faster ramp time
2. TerraLogistics — 34% improvement in close rates
3. Energy sector reference — 28% pipeline growth

Let me know what you think and we can set up that demo.

Best,
Alex

Hi Tom,

Just following up on the case studies I sent last week. Had a chance to review them?

Happy to schedule a quick demo whenever works for you.

Best,
Alex

Tom,

Circling back one more time. I also wanted to share something relevant — we just published a report on AI adoption in the analytics industry. Given Greenfield's focus on data analytics, I thought you might find the section on sales team productivity interesting.

[link to report]

Still happy to chat whenever the timing is right.

Alex

Alex,

Sorry for the radio silence — things have been crazy here. We ended up going with CompetitorAlpha for now. The price point was a big factor since we're a smaller team.

Appreciate you sending all those materials though. If things change, I'll reach out.

Tom
